005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.util.simulation;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.*;
009
010import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.intake.Intake;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.intake.Intake.IntakeState;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter.ShooterState;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
016import dev.doglog.DogLog;
017import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
018import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose3d;
019import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation2d;
020import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation3d;
021import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Translation2d;
022import edu.wpi.first.networktables.NetworkTableInstance;
023import edu.wpi.first.networktables.StructArrayPublisher;
024import edu.wpi.first.networktables.StructPublisher;
025import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Angle;
026import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Distance;
027import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.LinearVelocity;
028import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.Notifier;
029import org.ironmaple.simulation.IntakeSimulation;
030import org.ironmaple.simulation.SimulatedArena;
031import org.ironmaple.simulation.drivesims.SwerveDriveSimulation;
032import org.ironmaple.simulation.seasonspecific.rebuilt2026.Arena2026Rebuilt;
033import org.ironmaple.simulation.seasonspecific.rebuilt2026.RebuiltFuelOnFly;
034
035public class Simulation {
036
037    private static final Simulation instance;
038
039    public final Arena2026Rebuilt arenaInstance;
040
041    private final Notifier shotLoop;
042
043    private final SwerveDriveSimulation swerveMSim;
044
045    private final IntakeSimulation intakeMSim;
046
047    private final Intake intakeSim;
048
049    private final Shooter shooterSim;
050
051    private final StructArrayPublisher<Pose3d> fuel;
052
053    private final StructPublisher<Pose3d> intakePivot;
054
055    private final StructPublisher<Pose3d> hopper;
056
057    private final StructArrayPublisher<Pose3d> fuelLayers;
058
059    private final StructPublisher<Pose3d> shooter;
060
061    static {
062        if (CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance().getMapleSimDrive() != null)
063            instance = new Simulation();
064        else
065            // extra safeguarding to ensure NO overlap between sim code and actual code
066            instance = null;
067    }
068
069    public static Simulation getInstance() {
070        return instance;
071    }
072
073    private Simulation() {
074        intakeSim = Intake.getInstance();
075        shooterSim = Shooter.getInstance();
076        swerveMSim = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance().getMapleSimDrive();
077        arenaInstance = new Arena2026Rebuilt(false);
078        configureArena();
079        intakeMSim = createIntakeSimulation();
080        intakeMSim.addGamePiecesToIntake(SimulationConstants.Hopper.FUEL_CAPACITY);
081        shotLoop = new Notifier(this::updateShooting);
082        shotLoop.startPeriodic(1.0 / SimulationConstants.Shooter.BPS);
083        NetworkTableInstance table = NetworkTableInstance.getDefault();
084        fuel = table.getStructArrayTopic("AdvScope/FuelPoses", Pose3d.struct).publish();
085        intakePivot = table.getStructTopic("AdvScope/IntakePose", Pose3d.struct).publish();
086        hopper = table.getStructTopic("AdvScope/HopperPose", Pose3d.struct).publish();
087        fuelLayers = table.getStructArrayTopic("AdvScope/FuelLayers", Pose3d.struct).publish();
088        shooter = table.getStructTopic("AdvScope/ShooterPose", Pose3d.struct).publish();
089    }
090
091    private void configureArena() {
092        arenaInstance.setEfficiencyMode(SimulationConstants.SPAWN_GAMEPIECES_SPARSELY);
093        arenaInstance.resetFieldForAuto();
094        arenaInstance.addDriveTrainSimulation(this.swerveMSim);
095        SimulatedArena.overrideInstance(arenaInstance);
096    }
097
098    private IntakeSimulation createIntakeSimulation() {
099        return IntakeSimulation.OverTheBumperIntake(
100                "Fuel",
101                swerveMSim,
102                Meters.of(SimulationConstants.Intake.INTAKE_WIDTH),
103                Meters.of(SimulationConstants.Intake.INTAKE_LENGTH),
104                IntakeSimulation.IntakeSide.FRONT,
105                SimulationConstants.Hopper.FUEL_CAPACITY);
106    }
107
108    private Pose3d getIntakePivotPose() {
109        return SimulationConstants.Intake.PIVOT_OFFSETS.withRotation(
110                new Rotation3d(
111                        0, // inverts the angle
112                        intakeSim.getRelativePosition().in(Radians),
113                        0));
114    }
115
116    private double getIntakeArmEndX() {
117        return SimulationConstants.Intake.PIVOT_END_X
118                + // sin works because we're zeroed at horizontal
119                Settings.Intake.Pivot.PIVOT_ARM_LENGTH.in(Meters)
120                        * Math.sin(
121                                intakeSim.getRelativePosition().in(Radians)
122                                        + SimulationConstants.Intake.PIVOT_OFFSETS.toRotation3d().getX());
123    }
124
125    private void updateIntakeEnabled(boolean enabled) {
126        if (enabled) {
127            intakeMSim.startIntake();
128        } else {
129            intakeMSim.stopIntake();
130        }
131    }
132
133    private void updateIntake() {
134        boolean intakeEnabled = intakeSim.atTargetAngle()
135                && (intakeSim.getState() == IntakeState.DOWN)
136                && Settings.EnabledSubsystems.INTAKE.get();
137        updateIntakeEnabled(intakeEnabled);
138    }
139
140    private void updateHopperFuel() {
141        final double hopperPercentage = (double) intakeMSim.getGamePiecesAmount()
142                / (double) SimulationConstants.Hopper.FUEL_CAPACITY;
143        final int layers = SimulationConstants.Hopper.FUEL_LAYERS;
144        final Pose3d visiblePose = SimulationConstants.Hopper.VISIBLE_POSE;
145        final Pose3d hiddenPose = SimulationConstants.Hopper.HIDDEN_POSE;
146        final Pose3d[] poses = new Pose3d[layers];
147        for (int i = 0; i < layers; i++) {
148            poses[i] = hopperPercentage >= (1 / (double) layers) * (i + 1) ? visiblePose : hiddenPose;
149        }
150        fuelLayers.set(poses);
151        DogLog.log("Intake/hopperpercentage", hopperPercentage);
152    }
153
154    /**
155     *
156     *
157     * <h2>Extension of {@link Arena2026Rebuilt#addPieceWithVariance} that uses
158     * chassis speeds</h2>
159     *
160     * <p>
161     * Adds a game piece too the arena with a certain random variance. Param docs
162     * taken from {@link
163     * Arena2026Rebuilt#addPieceWithVariance}
164     *
165     * @param info                       the info of the game piece
166     * @param robotPosition              the position of the robot (not the shooter)
167     *                                   at the time of launching the
168     *                                   game piece
169     * @param shooterPositionOnRobot     the translation from the shooter's position
170     *                                   to the robot's
171     *                                   center, in the robot's frame of reference
172     * @param chassisSpeedsFieldRelative the field-relative velocity of the robot
173     *                                   chassis when
174     *                                   launching the game piece, influencing the
175     *                                   initial velocity of the game piece
176     * @param shooterFacing              the direction in which the shooter is
177     *                                   facing at launch
178     * @param initialHeight              the initial height of the game piece when
179     *                                   launched, i.e., the height of
180     *                                   the shooter from the ground
181     * @param launchingSpeed             the speed at which the game piece is launch
182     * @param shooterAngle               the pitch angle of the shooter when
183     *                                   launching
184     * @param xVariance                  The max amount of variance that should be
185     *                                   added too the x coordinate of the
186     *                                   game piece.
187     * @param yVariance                  The max amount of variance that should be
188     *                                   added too the y coordinate of the
189     *                                   game piece.
190     * @param yawVariance                The max amount of variance that should be
191     *                                   added too the yaw of the game
192     *                                   piece.
193     * @param speedVariance              The max amount of variance that should be
194     *                                   added too the speed of the game
195     *                                   piece.
196     * @param pitchVariance              The max amount of variance that should be
197     *                                   added too the pitch of the game
198     *                                   piece.
199     * @param target                     The target of the gamepiece
200     */
201    private void robotRelativeAddPieceWithVariance(
202            Translation2d piecePose,
203            Rotation2d yaw,
204            Distance height,
205            LinearVelocity speed,
206            Angle pitch,
207            double xVariance,
208            double yVariance,
209            double yawVariance,
210            double speedVariance,
211            double pitchVariance) {
212        arenaInstance.addGamePieceProjectile(
213                new RebuiltFuelOnFly(
214                        piecePose.plus(
215                                new Translation2d(
216                                        Arena2026Rebuilt.randomInRange(xVariance),
217                                        Arena2026Rebuilt.randomInRange(yVariance))),
218                        new Translation2d(),
219                        swerveMSim.getDriveTrainSimulatedChassisSpeedsFieldRelative(),
220                        yaw.plus(Rotation2d.fromDegrees(Arena2026Rebuilt.randomInRange(yawVariance))),
221                        height,
222                        speed.plus(MetersPerSecond.of(Arena2026Rebuilt.randomInRange(speedVariance))),
223                        Degrees.of(pitch.in(Degrees) + Arena2026Rebuilt.randomInRange(pitchVariance))));
224    }
225
226    private void summonFuelAtIntake() {
227        robotRelativeAddPieceWithVariance(
228                swerveMSim
229                        .getSimulatedDriveTrainPose()
230                        .getTranslation()
231                        .plus(
232                                SimulationConstants.Intake.OUTTAKE_OFFSETS
233                                        .applyToPose3dRobotRelative(
234                                                new Pose3d(
235                                                        getIntakeArmEndX(),
236                                                        0,
237                                                        0,
238                                                        new Rotation3d(
239                                                                swerveMSim.getSimulatedDriveTrainPose().getRotation())))
240                                        .getTranslation()
241                                        .toTranslation2d()),
242                swerveMSim.getSimulatedDriveTrainPose().getRotation(),
243                Meters.of(0),
244                MetersPerSecond.of(2),
245                Radians.of(0), // x
246                SimulationConstants.Intake.INTAKE_WIDTH,
247                0.0,
248                0.0, // speed
249                1.0,
250                0.0);
251    }
252
253    private void updateShooting() {
254        if (intakeSim.getState() == IntakeState.OUTTAKE
255                && Settings.EnabledSubsystems.INTAKE.get()
256                && intakeMSim.obtainGamePieceFromIntake()) {
257            summonFuelAtIntake();
258        } else if ((shooterSim.getState() == ShooterState.SHOOT
259                || shooterSim.getState() == ShooterState.FERRY)
260                && Settings.EnabledSubsystems.SHOOTER.get()) {
261            final Pose2d shooterPose = SimulationConstants.Shooter.OFFSETS.applyToPose2d(
262                    swerveMSim.getSimulatedDriveTrainPose());
263            final double launchAngle = 67.67;
264            robotRelativeAddPieceWithVariance(
265                    shooterPose.getTranslation(),
266                    swerveMSim.getSimulatedDriveTrainPose().getRotation(),
267                    Meters.of(SimulationConstants.Shooter.OFFSETS.toPose3d().getZ()),
268                    MetersPerSecond.of(
269                            SimulationConstants.Shooter.angularVelocityToMps(
270                                    shooterSim.getCurrentAngularVelocity())),
271                    Degrees.of(launchAngle),
272                    SimulationConstants.Intake.INTAKE_WIDTH,
273                    0,
274                    0,
275                    0.5,
276                    0);
277        }
278    }
279
280    public synchronized void update() {
281        if (swerveMSim == null)
282            return;
283        fuel.set(arenaInstance.getGamePiecesArrayByType("Fuel"));
284        updateIntake();
285        updateHopperFuel();
286        double armEndX = getIntakeArmEndX();
287        intakePivot.set(getIntakePivotPose());
288        hopper.set(
289                SimulationConstants.Hopper.OFFSETS.applyToPose3d(
290                        new Pose3d(armEndX, 0, 0, new Rotation3d())));
291        // Translation2d outtakeTranslationRobotRelative =
292        // swerveMSim.getSimulatedDriveTrainPose().getTranslation().plus(
293        // SimulationConstants.Intake.OUTTAKE_OFFSETS.applyToPose3dRobotRelative(
294        // new Pose3d(getIntakeArmEndX(), 0, 0, new
295        // Rotation3d(swerveMSim.getSimulatedDriveTrainPose().getRotation()))).getTranslation().toTranslation2d());
296        // shooter.set(new Pose3d(tra.getX(), tra.getY(), 0, new Rotation3d()));
297        // shooter.set(SimulationConstants.Shooter.OFFSETS.applyToPose3dRobotRelative(new
298        // Pose3d(swerveMSim.getSimulatedDriveTrainPose())));
299    }
300}
